---
name: Feature Request
about: Incoming feature request from discovery agent or user research
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "type:feature-request,status:triage"
assignees: ""
---

## Feature summary
<!-- One sentence: what is the feature and who is it for? -->

## Source
<!-- Where did this request come from? -->
- [ ] Discovery agent
- [ ] User research / interview
- [ ] Competitive analysis
- [ ] Internal observation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Problem it solves
<!-- What user problem or gap does this address? Be specific about the failure mode. -->

## Proposed behavior
<!-- Describe what the feature does from the user's perspective. No implementation details — that's for the Design + Engineering agents. -->

## DAW convention reference
<!-- Does Ableton, Logic, or Pro Tools do something similar? If so, what is the convention, and does this proposal match or intentionally deviate? -->

## Scope estimate
<!-- PM's initial read — do not fill in if you're the discovery agent -->
- [ ] Small (single component, 1 agent, 1 sprint task)
- [ ] Medium (new spec required, 2–3 agents)
- [ ] Large (new screen or architectural change — requires Tech Lead review)
- [ ] Unknown — needs PM scoping

## Proposed sprint
<!-- Leave blank for triage -->
- [ ] Sprint 1 (closing — only critical fixes)
- [ ] Sprint 2 (Real-Time Collaboration)
- [ ] Sprint 3 (Audio Depth)
- [ ] Backlog / Future
- [ ] Needs PM decision

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- What must be true for this to be considered done? Bullet list. Leave blank if unknown — PM will fill in. -->

## Open questions
<!-- What must be answered before any agent can start work? -->
